bullets.text: Three people have died on a cruise ship due to a suspected hantavirus outbreak, with one case confirmed and five others under investigation by the World Health Organization.
Iran claims the U.S. has responded to its latest peace proposal, though the U.S. has not formally confirmed this. Former President Trump reportedly told Israeli media the response was unacceptable.

The world's largest conference on human rights and technology, RightsCon 2026, has been cancelled by Zambia just days before its start, with the government stating it did not 'align with national values'.
A cargo ship near the Strait of Hormuz reported being attacked by multiple small craft amidst ongoing peace negotiations, marking a significant incident in the region.
Three passengers have died after a suspected hantavirus outbreak on a cruise ship, with additional individuals reportedly falling ill.
Russian drone attacks have resulted in 10 deaths in Ukraine, while Ukraine claims to have targeted oil tankers and terminals.
Global banks are exploring private deals and risk transfers to reduce their exposure to data center debt, aiming to avoid being overwhelmed by the AI boom.
US President Donald Trump has stated that the US will begin assisting some ships in leaving Hormuz starting Monday morning, Middle Eastern Time.
OPEC+ nations have agreed to a modest and symbolic increase in their June production quotas, maintaining a business-as-usual message despite the UAE's surprise exit.
